Other: 1312: At 1:12 P.M. the ship was placed in commision by Captain E. Y. McCauley Ex Office of the Navy Yard turning over the command of the vessel, her officers and crew to Captain John C. Febiger when the Ensign and Pendant were hoisted.

Note: 1915: Cape May Lt brg N1/2W. Cape Henlopen Light WxN.
2000: Cape May Lt brg NW and Cape Henlolpen Lt brg W1/2N. 2030: Made Five Fathom Shore Light brg NExN.
2100: Lost sight of Cape May and Cape Henlopen Lights.
2230: Lost sight of Five Fathom SHore Light.
Noon: cc ESE. Noon: DR: Long: 68 49W.

Other: 2000: An Aurora Borealis of vivid colors, red and green, in the first hour of the watch.

Note: 1715: Anchored. Brgs: Loo Rock NW1/2W. Pillar NxE1/4E, Elheo da Forjia WxN.

Other: 0740: Hauled up foresail, hauled down jib and fore topmast stay sails, clewed up royal. Hove ship to with fore top sail to the mast and lowered whale boat to pick up a hammock dropped overboard accidentally.

Note: 1100: Made out Cape Freio brg WNW1/2w.
1850: Anchored. Brg: Rat Id NW1/2W; Fort Villegagnon SSW1/4W; St Cny SSE1/4E.
1030: Got Underway. Stood out of harbor.
1310: Raza Island brg E3/4N; Rodunda W3/4S.
